g.text: paper, book, oracle, conv, skill, quest,
todo, memory, gripe, fc, web, youtube, math,
cite_key with its own generated tsv. One
source of truth; queries JOIN to chunks.
pdf_sha256 : char(64) «PK» ' SHA-256 of file bytes
content_hash : char(64) ' SHA-256 of normalized text
collision risk vs. trivial space saving.
chunk_kind : text ' card_*, paragraph, figure, equation,
block_ids : bigint[] ' Marker blocks (papers); empty otherwise
page_first : int ' NULL for non-paper / for cards
page_last : int ' NULL for non-paper / for cards
Synthetic chunks at ord<0 give different
ref-level views, each with its own
start at ord=0. Default ingest creates
namespace : text ' SRC, CACHE, STATUS, PRIO, ...
